# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the milestone next/run feature changes (including active milestone selection refactor) end-to-end against `src/cli/milestone.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/{bead_refs.rs,controller.rs,mod.rs}`, `src/contexts/workspace_governance/mod.rs`, and the related tests. No fix-now, planned-elsewhere, or propose-new-bead findings with correctness/safety impact were identified in this patch.

## Amendments

None.
